message:
fix(workspace): clear clippy -D warnings blockers

- cursor.rs: doc_lazy_continuation (+ → "and" in prose), unnecessary_sort_by
  allow on the Reverse<usize>-avoiding sort, too_many_arguments allow on the
  already-dead-code landing primitive.
- connection.rs: dead_code allow on QF seed path (disabled 4ea55010);
  unnecessary_wraps + needless_pass_by_ref_mut allow on qf_maybe_short_circuit
  because Result/&mut are preserved for the disabled seed-on-first-consult path.
- vectorized_ops.rs: test comparison &[u8] < [u8;5] failed to compile;
  .as_slice() on the bstring literal fixes it.
- swarm_multiprocess.rs count_progress_last_id: return Ok(None) on 0 rows
  instead of erroring; matches the function signature's Option intent so the
  trace log distinguishes "worker not yet started" from "query failure".
- cargo fmt normalization across cell.rs and comprehensive_bench.rs.

cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1112,7 +1112,7 @@ mod tests {
         let row_sel: Vec<u16> = values
             .iter()
             .enumerate()
-            .filter(|&(_, v)| v.as_bytes() < b"delta")
+            .filter(|&(_, v)| v.as_bytes() < b"delta".as_slice())
             .map(|(i, _)| i as u16)
             .collect();
